documents: Refinery utilization rose modestly week over week, but regional constraints remain.
Traffic camera counts dipped during the storm window, then rebounded the following day.
Pipeline nominations indicate a steady flow with minor disruptions near the hub.
Retail fuel prices softened slightly, with diesel holding firmer than gasoline.
Port activity shows a seasonal increase in container throughput and truck turn times.
Macro data suggests resilient demand despite tightening financial conditions.
Holiday travel patterns shifted earlier, increasing weekday volumes on key corridors.
Industrial output eased in the latest print, weighing on freight movement indicators.
Weather-adjusted mobility remains above the prior-year baseline across major metros.
